equivalents_en: kind of lizard: red-headed agama (Agama agama)

senses.definition_en: kind of lizard: red-headed agama (Agama agama)
senses.definition_dg: Aina ya mjusi mwenye chitswa cha rangi ya kundu. Munyama uhu ni mkpwulu kuriko mjusi wa kawaida.

examples.dg: Valavala kagbwirwa kuno phara pho ukutani.
examples.en: A red-headed agama was caught there on the wall.
examples.sw: Kenge alinaswa pale ukutani.

senses.definition_dg: Kushambuliya mutu au phatu bila kudzamanywa. Kuinjira kwa nguvu phatu ambapho kukalazwa.

examples.en: The enemies invaded the village at night.
examples.sw: Maadui walishambulia kijiji usiku.

senses.definition_dg: Kushambuliya mutu kpwa nguvu.

examples.en: The thief attacked the person on the road.
examples.sw: Mwizi alishambulia mtu njiani.

equivalents_en: contain the infinitive forms ‘to’ in English and ‘ku-’ in Swahili. Spelling and pronunciation A detailed spelling guide can be found just before the Digo-English-Swahili

senses.definition_en: contain the infinitive forms ‘to’ in English and ‘ku-’ in Swahili. Spelling and pronunciation A detailed spelling guide can be found just before the Digo-English-Swahili
senses.definition_dg: Maneno ga kutenda ambago kpwa Chiingereza gaandza na 'to' na kpwa Chiswahili gaandza na 'ku-'.

examples.en: Verbs are words like 'to eat', 'to sleep', 'to go'.
examples.sw: Vitenzi ni maneno kama 'kula', 'kulala', 'kwenda'.

senses.definition_en: sambi now, soon, as soon as, just
senses.definition_dg: Neno ra wakati rinaonyesa sambi hivi, au wakati ambao u phephi sana.

examples.en: We will go home soon (we are about to leave)
examples.sw: Tunaenda nyumbani sasa hivi.

examples.dg: Vi sambi nchiuka hipha tu n'ndamwambira
examples.en: As soon as I leave from here I will tell him
examples.sw: Tunaenda nyumbani sasa hivi.

examples.dg: Rehani ng'onda anjina mchioagbwira vi sambi
examples.en: Bring some of the fish that you have just caught
examples.sw: Tunaenda nyumbani sasa hivi.

senses.definition_dg: Kupigana kwa makundi mairi au zaidi kpwa silaha. Kondo kulu kahi ya atu au matsi.

examples.en: In the war the enemies were fierce
examples.sw: Vita vilipoanza, watu wengi walikimbia kijiji.

senses.definition_dg: Phatu pha mbari ambapo atu a ukoo anazikwa. Vikura ni phatu pha hishima sana kpwa Adigo.

examples.dg: Babu wazikwa vikura vya ukoo wehu.
examples.en: Grandfather was buried at our family graveyard.
examples.sw: Babu alizikwa makaburini pa ukoo wetu.

senses.definition_dg: Phatu pha mbari ambapo atu a ukoo anazikwa. Vikura ni phatu pha hishima sana kpwa Adigo.

examples.dg: Babu wazikwa vikura vya ukoo wehu.
examples.en: Grandfather was buried at our family graveyard.
examples.sw: Babu alizikwa makaburini pa ukoo wetu.

senses.definition_dg: Bahati au mambo manono ganagomuhendekera mutu.

examples.en: He is lucky
examples.sw: Bahati yao ni nzuri; wanashinda kila wakati.

senses.definition_dg: Kufunika chitu na kugbwikira nyumba kpwa makuti au nyasi.

examples.en: The people thatched the house with palm leaves.
examples.sw: Watu waliezeka nyumba kwa makuti.

senses.definition_dg: Neno rinatumiwa kuonyesa wakati wa sambi au kuandza maneno.

examples.dg: Waambwa usirye papa, vino mbona kugbwira mizizo?
examples.en: You were told not to eat shark, so why didn't you take that advice?
examples.sw: Uliambiwa usile papa, basi mbona kubeba mizigo?

senses.definition_dg: Kpwa njira ihi, vivyo hivyo.

examples.dg: Anakufuru Mlungu ati!" "Why is thi sfellow talking in this way?
examples.en: Surely he is blaspheming!"
examples.sw: Fanya hivyo ninavyokuambia.

senses.definition_dg: Vivyo hivyo, kpwa njira mwenga-mwenga. Bila kubadilika.

examples.en: Just as you did at first
examples.sw: Vilevile ulivyofanya mwanzo, fanya na sasa.

senses.definition_dg: Vivyo hivyo, kpwa njira mwenga.

examples.dg: Viratu vira unavyohendwa, henda na uwe.
examples.en: Likewise as it is done for you, do the same.
examples.sw: Vilevile unavyofanyiwa, fanya na wewe.

equivalents_en: result of breaking some sexual taboo

senses.definition_en: result of breaking some sexual taboo
senses.definition_dg: Mambo mabaya ganagomphaha mutu kpwa sababu ya kuvundza mwiko wa ngono kahi ya ukoo.

examples.dg: Vitiyo ni ugonjwa mbaya ambao ukoo ndzima unauhenda.
examples.en: The result of breaking a sexual taboo is a serious matter for the whole clan.
examples.sw: Matokeo ya zinaa ya maharimu ni jambo baya kwa ukoo mzima.

senses.definition_dg: Miti midide-midide na nyasi nyire ambayo inamera tsini ya miti mikulu.

examples.en: The rabbit hid itself in the undergrowth.
examples.sw: Sungura alijificha kwenye vichaka.

senses.definition_dg: Dzulu ya chitswa, uphande wa dzulu kabisa.

examples.en: The sun is directly overhead (See: chitswa)
examples.sw: Jua liko utosini, ni saa sita.

senses.definition_dg: Mambo ga ajabu ganagoshangaza atu. Chitu ambacho chikaonwa buda.

examples.en: A wonderful thing
examples.sw: Jambo la ajabu lilitokea kijijini.

examples.en: We are going home now (we are on the way) (See: sambi, vi sambi, vino)

senses.definition_en: to be imperfect, to be underdeveloped
senses.definition_dg: Kukala na kasoro, kukala ukakamilika.

examples.dg: Munda uhu waviya, mavuno ni madide.
examples.en: This farm is unproductive, the harvest is small.
examples.sw: Shamba hili limeharibika, mavuno ni madogo.

senses.definition_dg: Kukala mutu asiye na achili nyinji au ambaye kahenda mambo ga achili.

examples.dg: Usimrehe ni mzuzu, kpwa sababu kakaviya.
examples.en: Don't think he is a fool, he is not stupid.
examples.sw: Usimdhani ni mpumbavu, hajapumbaa.

senses.definition_en: to be unproductive, to function poorly (used of animate beings or their
senses.definition_dg: Kukala bila kuzala au kutoa matunda manono. Inatumiwa kpwa atu au nyama.

examples.en: That cow is unproductive, it doesn't give birth.
examples.sw: Ng'ombe yule ameharibika, hazai.

sub_entries.definition_sw: kutofanya kazi vizuri (watu na wanyama tu)

examples.en: A coconut tree which does not do well

senses.definition_dg: Kutserera kpwa upesi dzulu kuphiya tsini.

examples.dg: Ariphopanda dzulu mnazini achiona nyoka, ndipho achivoromoka
examples.en: When he climbed to the top of the coconut palm he saw a snake, so he rushed back down
examples.sw: Alipopanda juu ya mnazi na kuona nyoka, ndipo alipoporomoka.

equivalents_sw: kutokwa na mimba kabla ya wakati

senses.definition_sw: kutokwa na mimba kabla ya wakati
senses.definition_dg: Kupoteza mimba kabla ya wakati wa kuvyala. Kukala na mimba ambayo inakoseka kabla ya miezi tisiya.

examples.dg: Ye mdawe wavodomosa kpwa sababu ya kugurira.
examples.en: The poor woman miscarried because of a fall.
examples.sw: Yule mwanamke maskini alitokwa na mimba kwa sababu ya kuanguka.

senses.definition_en: to request, to ask, to pray
senses.definition_dg: Kuomba mutu akuphe chitu au akuhendere upendeleo. Kuvoya piya ni kumuomba Mlungu.

examples.en: I would like some tea
examples.sw: Naomba chai, mimi nina kiu.

sub_entries.definition_en: be in the habit of begging

senses.definition_dg: Angaliya vundza.

examples.dg: Voza ni neno ranjina ra kuvundza.
examples.en: Voza is another word for breaking.
examples.sw: Voza ni neno lingine la kuvunja.

senses.definition_dg: Kutiya chitu chinji sana hadi chifurike.

examples.dg: Usivozere madzi ndani ya debe hadi gafurike.
examples.en: Don't overfill the water in the container until it overflows.
examples.sw: Usijaze maji ndani ya debe hadi yafurike.

senses.definition_en: to leak, to spring a leak
senses.definition_dg: Madzi kutsupa phatu ambapo paganyika. Kama kpwenye paa au phatu pha kuhifadhiya madzi.

examples.dg: Dari ya nyumba inavudza mvula ichinyesha.
examples.en: The roof of the house leaks when it rains.
examples.sw: Dari ya nyumba inavuja mvua inyeshayo.

senses.definition_en: to settle, to go down (as in a filled pit latrine when left for some days)
senses.definition_dg: Kutserera na kuphunguka, hasa kpwa udongo au chitu chirichojazwa. Dza choo cha shimo richikala siku kadhaa.

examples.dg: Udongo urivomezwa shimoni wavudzala bada ya siku chache.
examples.en: The soil that was poured into the pit settled after a few days.
examples.sw: Udongo uliomwagwa shimoni ulipwaya baada ya siku chache.

equivalents_en: cook when this involves stirring a thick porridge

senses.definition_en: to cook when this involves stirring a thick porridge
senses.definition_dg: Kupika chakurya chinene dza ugali kpwa kuchikoroga-koroga na mwiko.

examples.dg: Jora rivugbwaro na unga wa makopa bahi riihwa jora ra chipitu
examples.en: Jora which is cooked with only the flour of dried cassava is called 'plain' jora
examples.sw: Uji uliosongwa kwa unga wa muhogo huitwa uji wa chipitu.

senses.definition_en: to untie, to open, to set free
senses.definition_dg: Kufungula chitu chirichofungbwa, dza fundo au mnyororo.

examples.en: He is untying the knot
examples.sw: Anafungua fundo alilofunga jana.

examples.en: She is opening the book
examples.sw: Anafungua fundo alilofunga jana.

senses.definition_dg: Kunyendeka bila usawa kpwa sababu ya kugaya kpwa mgulu au kpwa kuumwa.

examples.dg: Baada ya kuumwa ni mgulu, waandza kuvuhira.
examples.en: After his leg was hurt, he started to limp.
examples.sw: Baada ya kuumia mguu, alianza kuchechemea.

senses.definition_dg: Kutsupa kula uphande wa muho, barabara, au phatu phanjina.

examples.en: He is crossing the river through the water.
examples.sw: Anavuka mto kwa maji.

senses.definition_en: to undress, to take off clothes
senses.definition_dg: Kuusa nguwo mwirini. Kuvula nguo.

examples.dg: Mwana wavula shati kabla ya kuoga.
examples.en: The child took off his shirt before bathing.
examples.sw: Mtoto alivua shati kabla ya kuoga.

senses.definition_dg: Phepho kupiga kpwa nguvu na kutengeza sauti.

examples.en: The wind is blowing all night long.
examples.sw: Upepo unavuma usiku kucha.

senses.definition_dg: Nyama au bahari kutoa sauti kulu ya kutisha.

examples.en: The lion is roaring far away in the bush.
examples.sw: Simba ananguruma mbali porini.

senses.definition_dg: Kutweta kpwa kupumzika haraka-haraka bada ya kuhenda kazi ngumu au kuzola.

examples.en: After running, he started panting.
examples.sw: Baada ya kukimbia, alianza kuhema.

senses.definition_dg: Aina ya tsodzi mkpwulu ambaye anaitwa na sauti yake usiku.

examples.en: The large owl is hooting in the tree at night.
examples.sw: Bundi mkubwa analia kwenye mti usiku.

senses.definition_dg: Kuhenda mchezo wa aina yoyosi. Kutumia wakati kpwa furaha.

examples.en: The children are playing in the field.
examples.sw: Watoto wanacheza uwanjani.

equivalents_en: roast (e.g. a tuber) under hot ashes
equivalents_sw: kuchoma kwa kutia chini ya jivu la moto

senses.definition_en: to roast (e.g. a tuber) under hot ashes
senses.definition_sw: kuchoma kwa kutia chini ya jivu la moto
senses.definition_dg: Kuchoma chitu dza muhogo au viazi kpwa kuchitiya ndani ya jivu ra moho.

examples.en: Mother roasted sweet potatoes under hot ashes.
examples.sw: Mama alichoma viazi chini ya jivu la moto.

senses.definition_dg: Kuchezea chitu au mutu.

examples.en: The child is playing with a ball.
examples.sw: Mtoto anachezea mpira.

equivalents_en: have one's stomach full of gas

senses.definition_en: to have one's stomach full of gas, to have indigestion
senses.definition_dg: Kuhisi ndani ya tumbo kukala na hewa au chakurya ambacho hakikasagika vinono.

examples.dg: Bada ya kurya muhogo munji, wavumbiwa.
examples.en: After eating a lot of cassava, he had indigestion.
examples.sw: Baada ya kula muhogo mwingi, alivimbiwa.

senses.definition_dg: Kulamuka kula usingizini.

examples.dg: Anavumbuluka ligundzu na saa kumi na mbiri.
examples.en: He wakes up in the morning at six o'clock.
examples.sw: Anaamka asubuhi saa kumi na mbili.

senses.definition_dg: Kugutusha nyama au chiumbe ambacho chinakala chinaphumzika.

examples.en: Don't disturb the animal that is sleeping.
examples.sw: Usimsumbue mnyama anayepumzika.

senses.definition_dg: Kuitikiya kpwa mutu ambaye anakuambiya chitu au ambaye anaimba.

examples.en: He knows how to respond well in conversation.
examples.sw: Anajua kuitikia vizuri mazungumzoni.

senses.definition_dg: Nyama kutoa sauti ya hasira au ya kutisha.

examples.en: The dog is growling angrily.
examples.sw: Mbwa anangurumia kwa hasira.

senses.definition_en: to be patient with, to persevere
senses.definition_dg: Kuvumiliya tabu au shida bila kukata tamaa. Kuenderera hata kpwa magumu.

examples.en: Be patient, things will get better.
examples.sw: Vumilia, mambo yatakuwa mazuri.

senses.definition_dg: Kueneza habari ambazo hazikamanyikana kama ni za kpweli au za handzo.

examples.dg: Atu anavumisa kpwa kpweli? Au ni handzo tu?
examples.en: Are people spreading rumours for real? Or is it just lies?
examples.sw: Watu wanaleta uvumi kweli? Au ni uongo tu?

equivalents_en: respond or answer (to a question or in a song)

senses.definition_en: to respond or answer (to a question or in a song)
senses.definition_dg: Kujibu swali au kuitikiya kpwa wimbo.

examples.en: When he was asked, he answered quickly.
examples.sw: Aliposemeshwa, alijibu haraka.

senses.definition_dg: Kukusanya mavuno mundani bada ya mimea kuiva.

examples.en: The women are harvesting rice in the field.
examples.sw: Wanawake wanavuna mpunga shambani.

senses.definition_en: to go bad, to go off (especially of food)
senses.definition_dg: Chakurya au chitu kingine kubanduha na kunuka. Kuhasirwa kpwa uzou.

examples.en: A poor person's belongings do not decay
examples.sw: Cha mchokozi kitaoza — methali ya Kidigo.

senses.definition_dg: Kuhenda chitu chivundzike, dza sahani au chisu.

examples.dg: Mwana wavundza sahani kpwa kukosa makini.
examples.en: The child broke the plate by being careless.
examples.sw: Mtoto alivunja sahani kwa kukosa makini.

sub_entries.definition_en: to go against custom, to violate a taboo

equivalents_sw: aina ya nyoka wa rangi ya kijani mwenye sumu

senses.definition_sw: aina ya nyoka wa rangi ya kijani mwenye sumu
senses.definition_dg: Aina ya nyoka wa rangi ya kijani ambaye ana sumu kali sana. Nyoka uhu ni wa hatari sana.

examples.dg: Vundza-marere ni nyoka wa hatari sana; ukimuona, uka kure.
examples.en: The green mamba is a very dangerous snake; if you see it, go far away.
examples.sw: Nyoka wa kijani mwenye sumu ni hatari sana; ukimwona, ondoka mbali.

senses.definition_dg: Kukala kuvundzwa au kuhasirwa — hali ya chitu ambacho chikavundzwa.

examples.en: The plate broke from falling down.
examples.sw: Sahani ilivunjika kwa kuanguka chini.

senses.definition_dg: Chitu ambacho hakionekana vinono au hakimanyikana sawa-sawa.

examples.dg: Neno riro ni ra vungu-vungu, sirimanya sawa-sawa.
examples.en: That word is indistinct, I don't understand it well.
examples.sw: Neno hilo halitambuliki, silijui vizuri.

senses.definition_dg: Phepho wa kula uphande wa kaskazini.

examples.dg: Phepho wa vuri unavuma na nguvu.
examples.en: The north wind is blowing strongly.
examples.sw: Upepo wa kaskazini unavuma kwa nguvu.

senses.definition_dg: Uphande wa kaskazini.

examples.dg: Nyumba iyo i uphande wa vuri.
examples.en: That house is on the north side.
examples.sw: Nyumba ile iko upande wa kaskazini.

senses.definition_dg: Msimu wa mvula chache ambazo zinanyesha kpwa muda mfupi.

examples.en: Now is the onset of the short rains
examples.sw: Huu ni msimu wa mvua ndogo, mvua ni chache.

senses.definition_en: to stir up, to disturb, to mess up, to put into disarray
senses.definition_dg: Kuchanganya mambo na kugahenda makongoni. Kuhasiri mpango.

examples.en: Don't mess up the things that have been neatly arranged.
examples.sw: Usivuruge vitu vilivyopangwa vizuri.

senses.definition_en: to assist someone to cross over, to see someone across (a road etc.)
senses.definition_dg: Kuterya mutu kutsupa phatu, dza barabara au muho.

examples.en: The father helped his child cross the road.
examples.sw: Baba alimvusha mtoto wake kuvuka barabara.

senses.definition_dg: Kugbwira chitu na kuchihehera uphande wako kpwa nguvu.

examples.en: Pull that rope with strength.
examples.sw: Vuta kamba hiyo kwa nguvu.

senses.definition_dg: Chisu ambacho chikavundzika nchaye na kutsala bila ya ncha.

examples.dg: Chisu hichi ni vutu, hakiweza kukata vinono.
examples.en: This knife has a broken tip, it can't cut well.
examples.sw: Kisu hiki hakina ncha, hakiwezi kukata vizuri.

senses.definition_dg: Kuphaha nguvu tsona bada ya kukala ukagaya au ukafwa. Kulamuka kula kufwa au kula usingizi wa kufwa.

examples.dg: Mutu yuya bada ya ugonjwa mkpwulu, wavuvumuka.
examples.en: That person revived after a serious illness.
examples.sw: Yule mtu alihuika baada ya ugonjwa mkubwa.

senses.definition_dg: Kuphephereza moho au chitu kpwa kupiga phepho na mkono au chitu chanjina.

examples.en: I am blowing on the fire (to kindle it)
examples.sw: Ninavivia moto ili uwake vizuri.

examples.en: The wind is blowing
examples.sw: Ninavivia moto ili uwake vizuri.

senses.definition_dg: Kugbwira ngʼonda au samaki baharini au muhoni.

examples.en: Father is going to fish in the sea.
examples.sw: Baba anakwenda kuvua samaki baharini.

senses.definition_en: savanna, plains, uncultivated place with a lot of grass
senses.definition_dg: Phatu pha nyasi nyire phatu ambapo haphakalimwe na atu. Phatu ambapo nyama a tsakani anaishi.

examples.dg: Twiga na simba ni nyama a vuweni
examples.en: Giraffes and lions are wild animals
examples.sw: Twiga na simba ni wanyama wa nyikani.

equivalents_en: ra chifudu water sprinkled on the head of a spirit-possessed person during a kayamba spirit appeasement ceremony to make the spirit happy
equivalents_sw: maji yanayonyunyizika kichwani kwa mteji wakati wa kayamba kupendeza pepo

senses.definition_en: ra chifudu water sprinkled on the head of a spirit-possessed person during a kayamba spirit appeasement ceremony to make the spirit happy
senses.definition_sw: maji yanayonyunyizika kichwani kwa mteji wakati wa kayamba kupendeza pepo
senses.definition_dg: Madzi ganagonyunyizwa chitswani pha mutu ariye na pepo wakati wa kayamba ili pepo ipendezwe.

examples.dg: Vuwo ra chifudu ranyunyizwa na mganga wakati wa kayamba.
examples.en: The spirit-appeasement water was sprinkled by the healer during the kayamba ceremony.
examples.sw: Maji ya kupendeza pepo yalinyunyizwa na mganga wakati wa kayamba.

senses.definition_dg: Nyere zinazotera sehemu za siri za mutu ariyevyaluka.

examples.en: You had sex in the fire and you burnt your pubic hair
examples.sw: Ukiomba moto utachomeka sehemu za siri — methali ya Kidigo.

senses.definition_en: to wear, to dress, to put on clothes etc
senses.definition_dg: Kutiya nguwo mwirini.

examples.en: Ali put on a loosely fitting shirt
examples.sw: Ali alivaa shati linalopwaya.

senses.definition_dg: Kushambuliya mutu kpwa nguvu na kumgbwirira.

examples.dg: Mwivi wavwamukira mutu ariyekala njira phakpwe.
examples.en: The thief assaulted the person who was on his way.
examples.sw: Mwizi alimvamia mtu aliyekuwa njiani.

equivalents_en: traditional ointment for skin diseases such as ringworms

senses.definition_en: traditional ointment for skin diseases such as ringworms, made from crushed medicinal leaves and oil. It can also be applied to
senses.definition_dg: Dawa ya chizamani inayohendwa na mitsanga ya mihi ya dawa na mafuha. Inapakwa ngozini kuphoza magonjwa dza vwashi.

examples.dg: Mganga wampaka vwanda ngozini ili aphole.
examples.en: The healer applied traditional ointment on his skin so he would heal.
examples.sw: Mganga alimpaka dawa ya jadi ngozini ili apone.

sub_entries.definition_en: of young babies to keep them healthy

examples.dg: Nkatumia vwanda hiri kpwa sababu nina vyoga
examples.en: I have used this skin ointment because I have ringworms

equivalents_en: fibres of sugar cane which remain once it has been eaten

senses.definition_en: fibres of sugar cane which remain once it has been eaten
senses.definition_dg: Vizuka vya muwa ambavyo vinatsuphuka bada ya muwa kuriywa.

examples.dg: Bada ya kurya muwa, utsupha vwanda.
examples.en: After eating sugar cane, throw away the fibres.
examples.sw: Baada ya kula muwa, tupa mabaki yake.

senses.definition_dg: Phatu pha tsini kahi ya myango miiri. Phatu ambapo madzi ganakusanyika.

examples.en: The river passes through the valley.
examples.sw: Mto unapita katikati ya bonde.

senses.definition_en: to snatch, to grab something from someone
senses.definition_dg: Kugbwira chitu kpwa nguvu na hamaki na kumgbwirira mutu chitu chake.

examples.dg: Mwivi wavwatula simu kula mikononi mwa mchetu.
examples.en: The thief snatched the phone from the woman's hands.
examples.sw: Mwizi alipokonya simu kutoka mikononi mwa mwanamke.

senses.definition_dg: Nguwo au chitu ambacho chinavwalwa.

examples.en: This garment is very beautiful.
examples.sw: Vazi hili ni zuri sana.

senses.definition_dg: Kugbwira chitu na kuchihehera uphande wako.

examples.en: To pull a lot (i.e
examples.sw: Kuvuta sana si kupata — methali ya Kidigo.

senses.definition_dg: Kukala kpwa pole-pole, kukosa haraka.

examples.en: He is slow
examples.sw: Ana upole kupita kiasi, hatafika kwa wakati.

senses.definition_dg: Hali ya kukala na uchovu mwirini, kukala na unyofu.

examples.dg: Ana vwenye-vwenye bada ya kuhenda kazi siku ndzima.
examples.en: He is tired after working the whole day.
examples.sw: Ana ulegevu baada ya kufanya kazi siku nzima.

senses.definition_dg: Kupendererwa na kuonewa makosa kidogo kuriko anjina.

examples.dg: Mwana iye anavwererwa ni ise kpwa sababu ni mdide.
examples.en: That child is favoured by his father because he is the youngest.
examples.sw: Mtoto yule anapendelewa na baba yake kwa sababu ni mdogo.

senses.definition_dg: Kuongeza maneno ambago si ga kpweli kpwa habari ili ionekane ni kulu zaidi.

examples.dg: Mutu iye anapenda kuvwesa; usimkubali vyosi.
examples.en: That person likes to exaggerate; don't believe everything he says.
examples.sw: Mtu yule anapenda kutia chumvi; usimkubali yote.

senses.definition_dg: Kutiya chitu ndani ya chitu cha madzi au kitu kingine cha majimaji.

examples.en: He dipped his hand into the water.
examples.sw: Alitia mkono ndani ya maji.

senses.definition_en: to help someone put on clothes, to buy clothes for someone
senses.definition_dg: Kuterya mutu kuvwala nguwo au kumgurira mutu nguwo.

examples.en: The mother dressed her child in new clothes.
examples.sw: Mama alimvisha mtoto wake nguo mpya.

senses.definition_en: to trap, especially using a fish trap
senses.definition_dg: Kuika mtego wa samaki madzini.

examples.dg: Baba wavwika mtego wa samaki muhoni.
examples.en: Father set a fish trap in the river.
examples.sw: Baba aliweka mtego wa samaki mtoni.

equivalents_en: leaves added to water in a bucket so that it will not slop over

senses.definition_en: leaves added to water in a bucket so that it will not slop over
senses.definition_dg: Makodza ambago ganatiywa ndani ya ndoo ya madzi ili madzi gasimwagike wakati wa kutsukulwa.

examples.dg: Tiya vwiko ndani ya ndoo ili madzi gasimwagike.
examples.en: Put leaves in the bucket so the water doesn't slop over.
examples.sw: Weka majani ndani ya ndoo ili maji yasimwagike.

sub_entries.definition_sw: majani yanayotiwa kwenye maji ili yasimwagikie anayebeba

senses.definition_dg: Kuimba na kucheza kpwa furaha.

examples.dg: Atu anavwina na furaha siku ya arusi.
examples.en: People are singing and dancing with joy on the wedding day.
examples.sw: Watu wanacheza kwa furaha siku ya arusi.

senses.definition_dg: Phatu pha kahi-kahi ya mgulu ambapho mgulu unavundzika. Sehemu ya mfupha ya phahali hipho.

examples.dg: Proverb: Vwindi kalamusa goyo na goyo kalamusa vwindi
examples.en: The front of the knee does not greet the back of the knee, and the back of the knee does not greet the front of the knee
examples.sw: Goti halinyooshi paja na paja halinyooshi goti — methali ya Kidigo.

senses.definition_dg: Kuunula mabega kpwa kuonyesa kumanya au kukala na wasiwasi.

examples.en: When asked, he just shrugged his shoulders.
examples.sw: Aliposemeshwa, aliinua mabega tu.

equivalents_en: mlomo to curl up ones lips (in disgust or annoyance)

senses.definition_en: mlomo to curl up ones lips (in disgust or annoyance)
senses.definition_dg: Kukonyeza mdomo kpwa kuonyesa kutoridhika au kukirihishwa.

examples.en: When she saw that food, she curled up her lips in disgust.
examples.sw: Alipokiona chakula hicho, alikonyeza mdomo.

senses.definition_dg: Kuterya mutu kuvwala nguwo.

examples.en: The mother is dressing her small child.
examples.sw: Mama anamvisha mtoto wake mdogo.

senses.definition_dg: Uphande wako, njira yako.

examples.en: Go away; go on your way
examples.sw: Nenda zako, usinisumbue.

senses.definition_dg: Uphande wakpwe, njira yakpwe.

examples.en: He went on his way; he went away
examples.sw: Alienda zake bila kumwambia mtu.

senses.definition_dg: Kuzala mwana au kuvyalwa kpwa mimea kutoa matunda.

examples.en: The goat gave birth to two kids.
examples.sw: Mbuzi amezaa watoto wawili.

senses.definition_en: to attend labour, to help a woman give birth (like a midwife)
senses.definition_dg: Kuterya mchetu kuvyala mwana. Kazi ya mkunga.

examples.en: The midwife helped that woman give birth at night.
examples.sw: Mkunga alimzalisha mwanamke yule usiku.

senses.definition_dg: Kutoka ndani ya mayo wakati wa kuvyalwa.

examples.en: The child was born on Friday.
examples.sw: Mtoto alizaliwa siku ya Ijumaa.

senses.definition_dg: Kuzala mwana au mimea kutoa matunda.

examples.en: This tree produces a lot of fruit.
examples.sw: Mti huu unazaa matunda mengi.

senses.definition_dg: Neno rinaonyesa ukulu wa umri, rinatumiwa na viumbe virivyo hai tu.

examples.dg: Mwana mvyere ni yuyu, yuya ni mdide.
examples.en: The older child is this one, that one is younger.
examples.sw: Mtoto mkubwa ni huyu, yule ni mdogo.

senses.definition_en: how, noun class 8 equivalent of cho
senses.definition_dg: Namna, jinsi. Ni neno ra ngʼeli ya 8, sawa na 'cho' kpwa ngʼeli yanjina.

examples.en: That is not how he was told.
examples.sw: Si vile alivyoambiwa.

senses.definition_dg: Ugonjwa wa ngozi ambao unaluma na kuenea mwirini, dza mashilingi.

examples.dg: Proverb: Usivumbire vyoga, vichihumbuka ni mahana
examples.en: Do not play around with skin complaints,
examples.sw: Usifiche mashilingi, yakitoka ni ukoma — methali ya Kidigo.

equivalents_en: wasi-wasi when they burst they become leprosy

senses.definition_en: wasi-wasi when they burst they become leprosy
senses.definition_dg: Ugonjwa wa ngozi ambao unaluma na kuenea mwirini, dza mashilingi.

examples.dg: Usivumbire vyoga, vichihumbuka ni mahana — msemo wa Chidigo.
examples.en: Don't hide ringworms, when they burst it becomes leprosy — a Digo proverb.
examples.sw: Usifiche mashilingi, yakitoka ni ukoma — methali ya Kidigo.

senses.definition_dg: Kukanyaga chitu kpwa mgulu.

examples.en: Don't step on that knife!
examples.sw: Usikanyage kisu hicho!

senses.definition_dg: Kpwa njira mbaya, bila uzuri. Kuhendwa kpwa makosa manji.

examples.dg: Nyumba hino yadzengbwa vyongo-vyongo; kuchikala na phepho indagbwa
examples.en: This house has
examples.sw: Nyumba hii imejengwa vibaya; ikiwa na dhoruba itaanguka.

sub_entries.definition_sw: if the wind blows it will collapse

senses.definition_dg: Mutu ambaye ana tabia za ajabu au ambaye kahenda mambo dza atu anjina.

examples.dg: Mutu yuya ni vyoni, kaambiki neno.
examples.en: That person is a freak, you can't tell him anything.
examples.sw: Mtu yule ni kijego, hamwambii lolote.
